name: Photon
description: Photon is an open-source geocoder built for OpenStreetMap data, powered by OpenSearch. It supports forward and reverse geocoding with multi-language search capabilities.

notes.text: Edit /opt/photon/.env to change COUNTRY_CODES (comma-separated ISO 3166-1 alpha-2) and REVERSE_ONLY, then run /opt/photon/update-data.sh to re-import.

The initial data import downloads ~25 GB and takes significant time. To skip the download on reinstall, pre-place the dump via: pct push <CTID> /path/to/photon-dump.jsonl.zst /opt/photon/photon-dump.jsonl.zst (the script checks the remote MD5 to validate freshness).
For Dawarich integration, set PHOTON_API_HOST to http://<LXC-IP>:2322 in your Dawarich configuration.
